title: montiaceae
intro: The montiaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are characterized by their small, delicate flowers and succulent leaves, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Members of the montiaceae family include the purslane and the orpine, which are commonly used in ornamental gardening and herbal remedies. The montiaceae family is known for its diverse range of species, with over 2,500 known plants that are widely distributed across the globe.
